name: Yejin Choi
exact_department: Paul G. Allen School of Computer Science & Engineering
sub_directions: Large Language Model (LLM) Development and Evaluation
NLP for Social Impact and Planetary Challenges
Agentic AI Systems for Scientific Discovery
recent_papers: Advancing Commonsense Reasoning through Large Language Models
Olmo: An Open-Source Foundation Model for Language Understanding and Generation
Generative Models for Computational Creativity in Text and Beyond
interest_paragraph: I am particularly drawn to Professor Choi's pioneering work in Commonsense Reasoning for AI and her contributions to Large Language Model development, especially through projects like Olmo. My interest extends to the application of NLP for Social Impact, aligning with the 'AI for the Planet' initiative, and the innovative integration of Agentic AI Systems for Scientific Discovery, which I believe holds immense potential for future research.
